description_long: This rifle features a classic wooden stock with a dark brown finish, paired with a black metal receiver and barrel. Mounted on top is a large, prominent optical scope, suggesting the rifle is designed for precision shooting at distance. The rifle includes a detachable box magazine and a vertical foregrip beneath the barrel for improved handling and stability. The barrel is of standard length and appears to lack any specialized muzzle device. The overall design is utilitarian, blending traditional and modern elements, making it suitable for both urban and tactical scenarios. The visible components are well-defined, with metallic and wooden textures clearly distinguishable.
description: A traditional rifle with a wooden stock, black metal barrel, large optical scope, and vertical foregrip, designed for precision and stability.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular end of the scope and barrel, with the vertical foregrip visible below.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wooden stock, large mounted scope, detachable magazine, and vertical foregrip.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the scope and stock, with the barrel and foregrip aligned centrally.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with the scope, stock, and magazine visible from the other side.
